text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 
66 
PTB_DRUG_EVENTS 
LABEL: 
Part B Drug Events 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the count of events in the Part B drug setting for a given year. An event is defined as each 
line item that contains the relevant service. 
Part B drug claims are a subset of the claims in the Part B carrier and DME data files. The Part B drug 
claim lines are identified by BETOS codes (CCW variable
